author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - PS5 Pro Immersion Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/assassins-creed-black-flag-resynced/

Available July 9, 2026 on PlayStation®5 consoles: https://www.playstation.com/games/assassins-creed-black-flag-resynced/

Discover the faithful, fully enhanced remake Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, now optimized for PlayStation®5 Pro. Powered by Ray‑Traced Global Illumination and Specular Reflections, the game also features upgraded PlayStation® Spectral Super Resolution at launch, alongside all core PS5® features such as haptic feedback, 3D audio, and more. Black Flag Resynced takes full advantage of PlayStation®5 consoles to deliver the definitive way to experience this classic adventure. 

#ps5 #ps5games #assassinscreedblackflag 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Samurai Outriders Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

Samurai Outriders slash their way through MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls!

The fifth and last team to enter the Challenge of the Champion is led by Robbie Reyes as Ghost Rider, and features three new playable characters: Blade, Deadpool and Loki!

The ultimate squad of anti-heroes is stepping into MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls to prove themselves!

MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls is coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!

Follow us for all the latest updates:
Twitter: https://x.com/MARVELTokon
BlueSky: https://bsky.app/profile/marveltokon.bsky....
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MARVELTokon/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marveltokon/

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Invincible VS - DLC 1 Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/invincible-vs/

The battle for Season One begins June 30th!

Fight with Universa and The Immortal. Flex new premium and earnable skins. Play Endless Arcade mode, and much more.

Don't get too comfortable though, Angstrom Levy is waiting...

The Immortal & Universa join Invincible VS on June 30th as the first two fighters of the Year 1 Character Pass. Come to our booth at Evo France and experience the 3rd DLC fighter: Angstrom Levy.

#ps5 #ps5games #invinciblevs 

Rated Mature
